about.title: About Me
about.text: I'm an experienced software developer from Tampere, Finland, with 25 years in the industry. I build full‑stack applications with modern web technologies, and I'm passionate about AI‑assisted development. Beyond code, I care deeply about UI/UX — because great software starts with how it feels.

footer.built_with: Built with Astro, Tailwind CSS & care
